onboarding.language_selection:
👋 Hesi! Welcome to Auto Tuckshop.

Which language would you like to use?

1️⃣ English
2️⃣ Shona
onboarding.role_selection:
Zvakanaka 👍

Who are you in the shop?

1️⃣ Shop owner
2️⃣ Shop assistant
3️⃣ Both (I own the shop and sell)
onboarding.assistant_linking_ask:
Ndinonzwisisa.

Are you the only one who will use Auto Tuckshop, or should we add another number?

1️⃣ Add another number
2️⃣ Skip for now
onboarding.assistant_linking_skipped: Zvakanaka. You can add them later.
onboarding.value_explanation: Auto Tuckshop inokubatsira kuwedzera mari automatically uye inokupa daily, weekly ne monthly summaries — without writing everything down.
onboarding.stock_setup_ask:
To get the best results, you can tell me what you sell and the prices.

Would you like to do that now?

1️⃣ Add stock now
2️⃣ Skip for now
onboarding.stock_setup_prompt:
Please tell me your items like this:

"Sugar 10 at R45, Rice 20 at R60"

You can use voice or text.
onboarding.stock_setup_complete:
Stock saved ✅
You can update this anytime.
onboarding.stock_setup_skipped:
Zvakanaka 👍
When you sell, just include the item, quantity and price.
onboarding.sales_instruction:
When you sell, just tell me what was sold.

Example:
'Sold sugar 2 at R45, rice 1 at R60'

You can send one message for many items.
onboarding.onboarding_complete:
Waita! 🎉

Start recording sales whenever you're ready.

waitlist.welcome:
Mwakadini! Unokona kutumira voice note kana kunyora zvawatengesa nyamashi.

(Hello! You can send a voice note or type what you sold today.)
waitlist.shop_name_noted:
Thanks! We got your shop name "{shop_name}".

You're still waiting. We'll check your request soon.
waitlist.still_pending:
Thanks for your message! You're still waiting.

We'll check your request soon. We'll send you a message when you're approved.
waitlist.rejected: Sorry, we can't approve your request. Please call us if this is wrong.

approval.welcome:
Welcome to Auto Tuck Shop! Mazvakanaka.

Shop: {company}

end_of_day.summary:
📊 Daily Summary:

{summary_details}

(You can continue logging sales. This is just a summary.)

Would you like to receive this summary automatically at the end of each day?

1️⃣ Yes
2️⃣ No
end_of_day.summary_enabled: Zvakanaka! You'll receive a daily summary automatically.
end_of_day.summary_disabled: Zvakanaka. You can always ask for a summary by saying 'summary' or 'report'.

summary_help.message:
You can request summaries anytime:

• 'summary' or 'done' = Today
• 'weekly summary' or 'week' = This week
• 'monthly summary' or 'month' = This month

error.processing_failed: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.

audio.download_failed: Sorry, I couldn't get your voice note. Please try again or send a text message.
audio.transcription_failed: Sorry, I couldn't hear your voice note clearly. Please send a text message.

assistant.not_owner: Sorry, only the shop owner can add helpers. Talk to the owner if you need help.
assistant.missing_phone: I didn't see a phone number. Please add it like this: 'add assistant +27821234567'
assistant.already_registered: This phone number {phone} is already being used.

sale.no_products: I didn't see any items. Please list them like this: "2 cokes, 1 chips"
sale.no_products_audio:
Ndazwa kuti:
"{text}"

I didn't see any items. Please list them like this: "2 cokes, 1 chips"
sale.missing_prices_note: Note: Some items don't have prices. Add prices like "2x Pear @ 5" to see totals.
